channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Base of tree needs pruning, 15th July
item.description:
Outside no.44 base of tree needs pruning, safety issue as difficult to reverse or park, with a school nearby its hard to see young children walking up the road when driving onto the drive - all other trees on this road have been pruned at the base recently
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxhawth Crescent, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A box with machine, 15th July
item.description:
Some rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19-26, Batchwood Green, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damp big chair, 15th July
item.description:
Folding chair and maybe big speaker inside rubbish bag

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Spurstowe Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive litter with rat problem, 15th July
item.description:
The bins for this flats are not cleaned and the landlord needs to be told that this is a hazard and the room is full of rubbish and rats etc

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Leswin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plastics recycling bin, 15th July
item.description:
Plastic recycling bin is not being collected, been full for 3 weeks Reported on missed bin collection but not resolved

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walsingham Walk, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped on pavement, 15th July
item.description:
Pardon the blury photo please, but a double sized mattress has been dumped on the pavement outside 1 Ridsdale Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Ridsdale Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead end road sign wonky, 15th July
item.description:
On junction of Trenholme Road with Anerley Park, a dead end road sign is a bit wonky. It looks like the bottom bracket has come loose. Could this be repaired, please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trenholme Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Graffiti on council street bin, opposite 120 Anerley Park, 15th July
item.description:
White tag depicting "SL" on black plastic surface of a council street bin opposite 120 Anerley Park. Do note that access is not possible from Penge High Street, due to road works at the junction of Anerley Park with Penge High Street. Operatives will need to approach from Thicket Road or Anerley Road direction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 122, Anerley Park, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped garden waste, 15th July

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jelf Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The pavement has become a rubbish bin, 15th July
item.description:
The black bin that used to be here has been gone for about 2 weeks now and the pavement is becoming a bin. Foxes are creating a mess and this is attracting mice and flies.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barretts Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rattray Road, Brixton, Greater London
